Package io.minio

Class PutObjectAPIBaseArgs

java.lang.Object
io.minio.BaseArgs
io.minio.BucketArgs
io.minio.ObjectArgs
io.minio.PutObjectAPIBaseArgs
Direct Known Subclasses:
PutObjectAPIArgs, UploadPartArgs
public abstract class PutObjectAPIBaseArgs extends ObjectArgs
Arguments of BaseS3Client.putObject(io.minio.PutObjectAPIArgs).
